_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Ability to organize a list of mission infrastructure to identify which dependent systems are key terrain
reference_document_element_description: Knowledge of infrastructure-as-code principles and tooling (e.g., Terraform, Pulumi) as applied to data platform provisioning and configuration management.
comments: DCWF ksa intersects with WIDAI DA domain. DA-K-011 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: TF-A-002 (TF, cosine: 0.455), TF-A-001 (TF, cosine: 0.447).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 2.2/10 (raw 0.222). Shared vocabulary: [infrastructure]. DCWF-only terms [ability, dependent, identify, key, list, mission] vs WIDAI-only terms [applied, code, configuration, data, knowledge, management] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.850 (P=0.859, R=0.841). Balanced P/R — the 16-word DCWF element and 18-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.7%). "Ability to organize a list of mission infrastructure to identify which dependent" and "Knowledge of infrastructure-as-code principles and tooling (e.g., Terraform, Pul" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.504 > STS 0.222 (gap +0.282). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [infrastructure] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 9.7%. Shared tokens: [infrastructure]. DCWF-only: [ability, dependent, identify, key, list, mission]. WIDAI-only: [applied, code, configuration, data, knowledge, management].
